title: Sovereign Corporate Capability Foundry
problem: Enterprises need capability growth across multiple profitable domains, not only one research benchmark. The system must allocate missions across procurement, finance, security, operations, energy, compute, and R&D.
mission: Create a portfolio-level capability foundry that assigns proof missions to specialist cells, measures alpha-Work Units, validates output, issues proof cards, and reinvests verified value across domains.
incremental: Moves from autoresearch to portfolio-level corporate capability formation.
value: Shows how a sovereign corporation can systematically convert work into a growing library of reusable capabilities.
plans: Sovereign Corporate Capability Foundry proof mission plan
rsi: The accepted artifact may influence future work only after evidence, evaluator review, reviewer validation, scope control, challenge window, rollback readiness, Selection Gate approval, and Chronicle entry.
